MINI MINUTES: Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported on 1/14/21. (D624)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Maribel Acosta is present.
Attorney Matthew Foose for the plaintiff.
Defendant Roshanak Najibi is present.
Attorney Matthew Barnette appearing for defendant.
Counsels from CSAA Insurance are also present at follows: Bruce Carmichael, Carla Haverkamp, Mark Inbody.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case is not settled. The Court provides counsel with a mediator's proposal with a deadline to accept as noon on 1/20/21. Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported on 1/14/21. On 1/20/21, Counsels in the matter accept the mediator's proposal.
